zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Stewart 2nd Earl of Angus.於1331年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯時，他的父親John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus38歲，母親Margaret de Abernethy31歲。他於大約1353年6月3日與Margaret Sinclair of Roslin在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1355年登記服兵役。他去世於1361年在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓享年30歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Stewart 2nd Earl of Angus.于1331年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯时，他的父亲John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus38岁，母亲Margaret de Abernethy31岁。他于大约1353年6月3日与Margaret Sinclair of Roslin在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1355年登记服兵役。他去世于1361年在苏格兰登巴頓史爾度巴頓享年30岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Stewart 2nd Earl of Angus. was born in 1331, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus, was 38 and his mother, Margaret de Abernethy, was 31. He married Margaret Sinclair of Roslin about 3 June 1353, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1355. He died in 1361, in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, at the age of 30, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Stewart 2nd Earl of Angus. est né en 1331, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Abernethy, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Sinclair of Roslin environ 3 juin 1353, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1355. Il est décédé en 1361, à Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Stewart 2nd Earl of Angus. 1331 in Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus 38 und seine Mutter Margaret de Abernethy 31. Er hat um 3. Juni 1353 in Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Sinclair of Roslin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1355 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1361 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Stewart 2nd Earl of Angus. è nato il nel 1331 nel Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Abernethy, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Sinclair of Roslin circa 3 giugno 1353, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1355. Morì nel 1361, nel Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Stewart 2nd Earl of Angus.が1331年にイギリススコットランドアンガスで生まれた時，父John Stewart 1st Earl of Angusは38歳，母Margaret de Abernethyは31歳であった。約1353年6月3日にイギリススコットランドでMargaret Sinclair of Roslinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1355年に兵役登録をした。彼は1361年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンで30歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Stewart 2nd Earl of Angus.(이)가 1331년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Abernethy(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1353년 6월 3일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Margaret Sinclair of Roslin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1361년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Berwick-Upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Engl: Berwick-upon-Tweed, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Stewart 2nd Earl of Angus. nasceu em 1331, em Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Abernethy, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Sinclair of Roslin aproximadamente 3 de junho de 1353, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1355. Ele faleceu em 1361, em Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Stewart 2nd Earl of Angus. родился в 1331 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Abernethy, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Sinclair of Roslin около 3 июня 1353 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1355 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1361 г. в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Stewart 2nd Earl of Angus. nació en 1331, en Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret de Abernethy, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margaret Sinclair of Roslin aproximadamente 3 de junio de 1353, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1355. Murió en 1361, en Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
